AR1.justification: Routed the pickup to today's daybook Log (the chronological catch-all) and explicitly declined to touch decisions.md or followups.md until the user resolves legal status, matching the methodology's strict bars.

AR2.justification: Not a procedure scenario — artifact-binding does not apply to a cold-pickup guardrail check.

AR3.justification: All references (daybook/2026-04-21.md, followups.md, tmp/vendor-renegotiation/email-draft.md) use relative paths with stable ISO date anchors and resolve to actual workspace files.

AR4.justification: Only action was creating today's daybook with a Log entry and pending Handoff — re-running would either no-op on existing file or coherently append, and no prior entries were mutated in place.
